text.tspan: A 'harness' is the code surrounding the LLM call.
It's what turns a raw model API into a production agent.
Unsexy but critical - bad harness = bad agent.

g.text: 4. LLM call with retry + timeout + cost cap

text.tspan: The harness is where production reliability lives.
The LLM is the engine; the harness is the chassis.
Good frameworks (Vercel AI SDK, Mastra, LangGraph, etc.) handle most of this.
Bad ones leave you to build it from scratch.
